source_jobs.title: Elevator Mechanic (Consultant)
source_jobs.description:
Life Space Digital is redefining premium real estate experiences through an elevated network of high-quality digital screens installed in elevators, lobbies, and select high-traffic environments. We operate at the intersection of real estate, technology, and media—bringing a sophisticated, modern content layer to Class A and top-tier properties nationwide.



Our platform is built for quality, reliability, and scale, delivering a premium experience that enhances property value, connects brands with affluent urban audiences, and sets a new standard in the U.S. DOOH market. Backed by experienced leadership and significant long-term investment, Life Space Digital is expanding rapidly across major U.S. cities. We are building a team of operators, technologists, and creators committed to precision, performance, and operational excellence as we lead the next chapter of premium digital out-of-home media.



We are seeking a skilled Elevator Mechanic with a minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience to install and maintain digital screens inside elevator cabs and lobbies across New York City. Licensed and unlicensed candidates are welcome to apply.



What you'll do:

 - Execute installations within scheduled access windows coordinated by the operations team, using proper lockout/tagout procedures to stop the elevator safely, ensuring all work is completed on time and elevator service is fully restored upon completion

 - Install digital screens inside elevator cabs and lobbies using mounting methods that are fully non-invasive — the only interface with the elevator is a single power connection; no modifications to mechanical, electrical control, or safety systems of any kind

 - Ensure all installations comply with ASME A17.1 cab interior requirements and NYC DOB standards, with zero impact on elevator certification or inspection status

 - Assess each elevator cab prior to installation to confirm that screen placement, cable management, and mounting hardware meet code requirements and will not trigger re-inspection obligations

 - Route and manage power connections cleanly and professionally, maintaining full separation from elevator control and operational wiring

 - Work with building staff to coordinate access as needed; familiarity with building protocols and elevator maintenance vendors is a plus

 - Troubleshoot screen hardware, power connections, and content delivery systems post-installation

 - Maintain detailed installation records for each property, including photos, cab dimensions, mounting specifications, and completion documentation



Who you are:

 - Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience working inside elevator cabs, mechanical rooms, or related building systems — licensed and unlicensed candidates are welcome to apply

 - Strong understanding of elevator cab interior standards and NYC DOB requirements as they relate to non-structural modifications

 - Experience working alongside or coordinating with elevator maintenance companies preferred

 - Comfortable working in confined spaces, at heights, and in elevator pits as needed

 - Capable of lifting up to 50 lbs and performing physically demanding installation work

 - Detail-oriented with a strong commitment to clean, professional workmanship

 - Reliable, punctual, and able to work independently across multiple properties

 - Strong communication skills for coordinating with building staff and management



Licenses & Certifications:

 - NYC Elevator Mechanic License issued by the NYC Department of Buildings is a plus but not required

 - OSHA 30-Hour Construction Safety certification preferred

 - Valid New York State driver's license
   
   

We offer comprehensive benefits package for full-time employees, including:

 - Healthcare: Medical coverage to keep you and your family healthy (employer covered premiums up to 100%)

 - Dental: Comprehensive dental plan

 - Vision: Vision coverage for eye care and eyewear

 - Talkspace Therapy Package: Access to mental hea

source_jobs.title: Director, Business Development
source_jobs.description:
Life Space Digital is reshaping the out-of-home media landscape through the deployment of digital screens in high-traffic office, multifamily, and retail environments. Our platform delivers content-rich experiences and targeted advertising directly to building occupants and visitors — starting in elevators, lobbies, and shopping center concourses. Backed by an experienced leadership team and aggressive growth targets, we are scaling across key U.S. markets with a focus on speed, precision, and long-term value for our partners.

 

We are seeking a Director, Business Development with deep, established relationships inside top commercial real estate property groups. This is not a cold-calling role — we are looking for someone who already has direct, trusted connections with asset managers, portfolio directors, and property leadership at major owners and operators across the office and multifamily sectors. You will leverage your existing CRE network to open doors, accelerate deal cycles, and close multi-site partnerships across key U.S. markets.

 

We partner directly with leading property owners to modernize buildings, elevate tenant experience, and unlock new revenue opportunities through digital media. At Life Space Digital, we combine high design with smart technology to redefine what people expect from everyday spaces.

 

Your Focus in the Sales Funnel:

 - Drive outbound prospecting and relationship-building with new accounts

 - Execute high-volume outreach and convert leads into qualified opportunities

 - Navigate complex sales cycles and close multi-site partnerships

 

What you'll get to do in this role:

 - Identify and pursue new business opportunities across assigned markets

 - Leverage your existing network within top commercial real estate property groups, including national office owners and operators such as Brookfield Properties, CBRE Investment Management, Hines, Boston Properties, Equity Commonwealth, Arden Realty, Paramount Group, and RXR Realty, as well as leading multifamily owners and operators such as Greystar, AvalonBay Communities, Equity Residential, Related Companies, Cushman & Wakefield, and Lincoln Property Company in order to accelerate deal cycles and drive partnership growth

 - Manage a high-activity pipeline with strong conversion metrics and deal velocity

 - Close long-term, multi-site agreements through consultative selling and value demonstration

 - Collaborate with internal teams to refine messaging and improve sales processes

 - Provide market intelligence on landlord priorities, competitive landscape, and emerging opportunities

 

Who you are:

 - 7+ years of business development or enterprise sales experience with a focus on commercial real estate — specifically selling into or working directly within major office, multifamily, or mixed-use property groups at the owner/operator level

 - Proven success in quota attainment through high-activity prospecting and relationship building

 - A pre-existing, warm network of senior decision-makers at top CRE property groups (you are on a first-name basis with VPs of Asset Management, Regional Portfolio Managers, or C-suite contacts at firms like Greystar, Hines, Brookfield Properties, Related Companies, CBRE Investment Management, AvalonBay, Equity Residential, RXR Realty, or comparable institutional owners and operators)

 - Proven track record of converting existing CRE relationships into signed, multi-site commercial agreements (you know how to translate a warm introduction into a closed deal)

 - Executive presence and polished communication skills — you are comfortable presenting to C-suite and senior leadership at major property groups and can credibly speak the language of real estate ownership and portfolio management

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and motivated by the opportunity to build something from the ground up

 - Proficiency with CRM systems (HubSpot experience preferred)

 

Life Space Digital offers a comprehensive ben

source_jobs.title: Outside Sales Representatives
source_jobs.description:
Life Space Digital is reshaping the out-of-home media landscape through the deployment of digital screens in high-traffic office, multifamily, and retail environments. Our platform delivers content-rich experiences and targeted advertising directly to building occupants and visitors — starting in elevators, lobbies, and shopping center concourses. Backed by an experienced leadership team and aggressive growth targets, we are scaling across key U.S. markets with a focus on speed, precision, and long-term value for our partners.


We are seeking Outside Sales Representatives to drive growth across key markets by building strategic partnerships with owners, developers, and operators in the office and multifamily space. You will develop territory strategies, cultivate new relationships, and guide deals from prospecting through close. This role is suited for a high-performing sales professional with strong real estate aptitude, proven ability to open doors and build trust from scratch, and the drive to exceed targets in a fast-scaling environment.



We partner directly with leading property owners to modernize buildings, elevate tenant experience, and unlock new revenue opportunities through digital media. At Life Space Digital, we combine high design with smart technology to redefine what people expect from everyday spaces.



Your Focus in the Sales Funnel:

 - Drive outbound prospecting and relationship-building with new accounts

 - Execute high-volume outreach and convert leads into qualified opportunities

 - Navigate complex sales cycles and close multi-site partnerships



What you'll get to do in this role:

 - Identify and pursue new business opportunities across assigned markets

 - Build relationships with property groups and portfolio owners from initial contact through partnership

 - Manage a high-activity pipeline with strong conversion metrics and deal velocity

 - Close long-term, multi-site agreements through consultative selling and value demonstration

 - Collaborate with internal teams to refine messaging and improve sales processes

 - Provide market intelligence on landlord priorities, competitive landscape, and emerging opportunities



Who you are:

 - 2+ years of B2B sales experience, ideally with exposure to commercial real estate, property management, multifamily, hospitality, or facility management buyers

 - Bilingual fluency in English and Mandarin is preferred; candidates without native Mandarin may be considered if they demonstrate market relevant experience

 - Proven success in quota attainment through high-activity prospecting and relationship building

 - Experience selling into property-related verticals preferred — you understand how buildings are managed, who makes buying decisions, and how to position value to property stakeholders

 - Strong hunter mentality with the ability to create opportunities, build trust quickly, and close deals independently

 - Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to engage property executives and decision-makers

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and motivated by the opportunity to build something from the ground up

 - Experience with CRM (Salesforce, Hubspot) systems preferred



Life Space Digital offers a comprehensive benefits package for full-time employees, including:

 - Healthcare: Medical coverage to keep you and your family healthy (employer covered premiums up to 100%)

 - Dental: Comprehensive dental plan

 - Vision: Vision coverage for eye care and eyewear

 - Talkspace Therapy Package: Access to mental health support

 - Commuter Benefits: Assistance for in-office employees’ commuting costs

 - Short-Term Disability: Financial protection in case of temporary disability

 - 401(k): Retirement savings plan with company match

 - Paid Time Off (PTO): Generous leave for vacation, personal time, and holidays



The base pay range for this position is $54,000-$81,000 with an uncapped commission structure. Base pay offered may var

source_jobs.title: Partnership Development Manager, Elevator Industry
source_jobs.description:
Life Space Digital is redefining premium real estate experiences through an elevated network of high-quality digital screens installed in elevators, lobbies, and select high-traffic environments. We operate at the intersection of real estate, technology, and media—bringing a sophisticated, modern content layer to Class A and top-tier properties nationwide.



Our platform is built for quality, reliability, and scale, delivering a premium experience that enhances property value, connects brands with affluent urban audiences, and sets a new standard in the U.S. DOOH market.



Backed by experienced leadership and significant long-term investment, Life Space Digital is expanding rapidly across major U.S. cities. We are building a team of operators, technologists, and creators committed to precision, performance, and operational excellence as we lead the next chapter of premium digital out-of-home media.



As our Partnership Manager, you’ll be at the forefront of building our ecosystem. You’ll identify, negotiate, and close long-term agreements with key elevator industry players, including elevator maintenance providers (Independents and Major OEMs), distributors, and consultant groups to enable the installation of our digital screens across new and existing elevator networks. This role is ideal for a leader with a deep understanding of the elevator industry to leverage their experience in negotiating and closing partnership agreements.



What you’ll do:

 - Identify, engage, and develop strategic partnerships with elevator manufacturers (OEMs), ISPs, distributors, and service companies.

 - Negotiate and close long-term, multi-year agreements that support large-scale deployment of our digital advertising screens.

 - Build and maintain senior-level relationships with key partners to drive sustained growth.

 - Collaborate with internal teams (operations, product, marketing) to ensure seamless execution of partnership commitments.

 - Analyze partnership performance, market trends, and new business opportunities
   
   to inform the growth strategy.

 - Represent the company at industry events and conferences to promote our partnership opportunities.

 - Collaborate with in-marketing to develop partnership materials and content focused on educating and encouraging partnership within the elevator sector.

Who you are:

 - 5+ years of elevator experience in partnership management, business development, and/or operational roles that utilized multifaceted approaches with different partners throughout the elevator ecosystem. Proven success in negotiating and managing long-term strategic agreements.

 - Strong industry network or familiarity with elevator systems, ISPs, or out-of-home advertising ecosystems.

 - Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to operate independently in a startup environment.

 - Exceptional communication, negotiation, and project management skills.

 - A passion for technology and smart-city innovation.
   
   

The pay range for this position is $95,000-$150,000 + bonus; however, the base pay may vary depending on job related knowledge, skills, candidate location, and experience.

source_jobs.title: Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
Life Space Digital is redefining premium real estate experiences through an elevated network of high-quality digital screens installed in elevators, lobbies, and select high-traffic environments. We operate at the intersection of real estate, technology, and media—bringing a sophisticated, modern content layer to Class A and top-tier properties nationwide.

 

Our platform is built for quality, reliability, and scale, delivering a premium experience that enhances property value, connects brands with affluent urban audiences, and sets a new standard in the U.S. DOOH market.

 

Backed by experienced leadership and significant long-term investment, Life Space Digital is expanding rapidly across major U.S. cities. We are building a team of operators, technologists, and creators committed to precision, performance, and operational excellence as we lead the next chapter of premium digital out-of-home media.

 

The Operations Manager will lead operational planning and execution at Life Space Digital, scaling the business efficiently, reliably, and with discipline. This role is responsible for building a high-performing team that delivers exceptional outcomes with rigorous cost control. You will design and implement the systems and processes that power our nationwide screen deployment and maintenance network — driving vendor negotiations that reset cost and performance benchmarks, while maintaining hands-on quality oversight.

 

Responsibilities span hardware logistics, installation and service operations, warehousing and 3PL coordination, field performance, and vendor management. The Operations Manager owns the department's annual budget, sets performance targets, controls costs, and ensures operational execution supports both company growth and margin goals. The role demands sharp commercial judgment and the ability to negotiate, challenge, and optimize vendor pricing and scopes across all markets — achieving breakthrough lows in cost-per-installation and service delivery.

 

From day one, you will take ownership of an early-stage operations function already in motion — strengthening installation workflows, market-level oversight, vendor alignment, quality controls, and the foundational processes of our operating model. This is a builder role with direct accountability: accelerating installation velocity, improving reliability, and driving measurable cost and quality improvements in real time.

 

This role partners closely with executive leadership and cross-functional teams — Business Development, Content, and Product — to translate strategic priorities into mature operating systems, service models, and long-term organizational capability. The ideal candidate executes quickly, thinks clearly, adapts readily, and grows from tactical operator into strategic architect as the company scales.

 

What you’ll do:

 - Design and implement the operational infrastructure required to support nationwide screen rollout, maintenance, logistics, and inventory management.

 - Oversee and scale core verticals: hardware logistics, installation and service operations, warehousing and 3PL relationships, field execution, and vendor performance.

 - Build and lead a team capable of high-stakes negotiation and cost optimization, with the right structure and capabilities to drive down installation costs and enforce quality standards across all markets.

 - Recruit, train, and manage a high-performing operations team, including in-house staff and external partners.

 - Develop SOPs, workflows, and performance standards that promote accuracy, accountability, and consistent execution nationally.

 - Own the operations budget — forecasting, cost control, and targeted reduction of cost-per-install and cost-per-service metrics.

 - Collaborate with Business Development to align operational timelines, installation readiness, and service planning with signed property partnerships.

 - Partner with Product and Content teams to ensure hardware, firmware, and

Our platform is built for quality, reliability, and scale, delivering a premium experience that enhances property value, connects brands with affluent urban audiences, and sets a new standard in the U.S. DOOH market.

 

Backed by experienced leadership and significant long-term investment, Life Space Digital is expanding rapidly across major U.S. cities. We are building a team of operators, technologists, and creators committed to precision, performance, and operational excellence as we lead the next chapter of premium digital out-of-home media.

 

The Operations Manager will lead operational planning and execution at Life Space Digital, scaling the business efficiently, reliably, and with discipline. This role is responsible for building a high-performing team that delivers exceptional outcomes with rigorous cost control. You will design and implement the systems and processes that power our nationwide screen deployment and maintenance network — driving vendor negotiations that reset cost and performance benchmarks, while maintaining hands-on quality oversight.

 

Responsibilities span hardware logistics, installation and service operations, warehousing and 3PL coordination, field performance, and vendor management. The Operations Manager owns the department's annual budget, sets performance targets, controls costs, and ensures operational execution supports both company growth and margin goals. The role demands sharp commercial judgment and the ability to negotiate, challenge, and optimize vendor pricing and scopes across all markets — achieving breakthrough lows in cost-per-installation and service delivery.

 

From day one, you will take ownership of an early-stage operations function already in motion — strengthening installation workflows, market-level oversight, vendor alignment, quality controls, and the foundational processes of our operating model. This is a builder role with direct accountability: accelerating installation velocity, improving reliability, and driving measurable cost and quality improvements in real time.

 

This role partners closely with executive leadership and cross-functional teams — Business Development, Content, and Product — to translate strategic priorities into mature operating systems, service models, and long-term organizational capability. The ideal candidate executes quickly, thinks clearly, adapts readily, and grows from tactical operator into strategic architect as the company scales.

 

What you’ll do:

 - Design and implement the operational infrastructure required to support nationwide screen rollout, maintenance, logistics, and inventory management.

 - Oversee and scale core verticals: hardware logistics, installation and service operations, warehousing and 3PL relationships, field execution, and vendor performance.

 - Build and lead a team capable of high-stakes negotiation and cost optimization, with the right structure and capabilities to drive down installation costs and enforce quality standards across all markets.

 - Recruit, train, and manage a high-performing operations team, including in-house staff and external partners.

 - Develop SOPs, workflows, and performance standards that promote accuracy, accountability, and consistent execution nationally.

 - Own the operations budget — forecasting, cost control, and targeted reduction of cost-per-install and cost-per-service metrics.

 - Collaborate with Business Development to align operational timelines, installation readiness, and service planning with signed property partnerships.

 - Partner with Product and Content teams to ensure hardware, firmware, and

source_jobs.title: Director, Business Development
source_jobs.description:
Life Space Digital is reshaping the out-of-home media landscape through the deployment of digital screens in high-traffic office, multifamily, and retail environments. Our platform delivers content-rich experiences and targeted advertising directly to building occupants and visitors — starting in elevators, lobbies, and shopping center concourses. Backed by an experienced leadership team and aggressive growth targets, we are scaling across key U.S. markets with a focus on speed, precision, and long-term value for our partners.

 

We are seeking a Director, Business Development with deep, established relationships inside top commercial real estate property groups. This is not a cold-calling role — we are looking for someone who already has direct, trusted connections with asset managers, portfolio directors, and property leadership at major owners and operators across the office and multifamily sectors. You will leverage your existing CRE network to open doors, accelerate deal cycles, and close multi-site partnerships across key U.S. markets.

 

We partner directly with leading property owners to modernize buildings, elevate tenant experience, and unlock new revenue opportunities through digital media. At Life Space Digital, we combine high design with smart technology to redefine what people expect from everyday spaces.

 

Your Focus in the Sales Funnel:

 - Drive outbound prospecting and relationship-building with new accounts

 - Execute high-volume outreach and convert leads into qualified opportunities

 - Navigate complex sales cycles and close multi-site partnerships

 

What you'll get to do in this role:

 - Identify and pursue new business opportunities across assigned markets

 - Leverage your existing network within top commercial real estate property groups, including national office owners and operators such as Brookfield Properties, CBRE Investment Management, Hines, Boston Properties, Equity Commonwealth, Arden Realty, Paramount Group, and RXR Realty, as well as leading multifamily owners and operators such as Greystar, AvalonBay Communities, Equity Residential, Related Companies, Cushman & Wakefield, and Lincoln Property Company in order to accelerate deal cycles and drive partnership growth

 - Manage a high-activity pipeline with strong conversion metrics and deal velocity

 - Close long-term, multi-site agreements through consultative selling and value demonstration

 - Collaborate with internal teams to refine messaging and improve sales processes

 - Provide market intelligence on landlord priorities, competitive landscape, and emerging opportunities

 

Who you are:

 - 7+ years of business development or enterprise sales experience with a focus on commercial real estate — specifically selling into or working directly within major office, multifamily, or mixed-use property groups at the owner/operator level

 - Proven success in quota attainment through high-activity prospecting and relationship building

 - A pre-existing, warm network of senior decision-makers at top CRE property groups (you are on a first-name basis with VPs of Asset Management, Regional Portfolio Managers, or C-suite contacts at firms like Greystar, Hines, Brookfield Properties, Related Companies, CBRE Investment Management, AvalonBay, Equity Residential, RXR Realty, or comparable institutional owners and operators)

 - Proven track record of converting existing CRE relationships into signed, multi-site commercial agreements (you know how to translate a warm introduction into a closed deal)

 - Executive presence and polished communication skills — you are comfortable presenting to C-suite and senior leadership at major property groups and can credibly speak the language of real estate ownership and portfolio management

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and motivated by the opportunity to build something from the ground up

 - Proficiency with CRM systems (HubSpot experience preferred)

 

Life Space Digital offers a comprehensive ben

notes: High volume of sales and business development roles, few tech roles.
